summary: Frontend-only test of new 'حسب الكاشير' view mode toggle in Reports > إغلاق الصندوق tab. All flows verified end-to-end: toggle appears, per-cashier grouping renders, aggregation math correct, expand shows individual shift rows with their own business_date/sales/orders/diff (proving shifts remain separate in data), regression toggles (كل شفت بمفرده / مجمّع) and integrity check still work.
critical_code_review_comments: Reports.js is very large (5631 lines) — consider splitting cash-register closing report into its own module for maintainability.

closingsHistory merges API closings with orphan shift-derived rows (~line 1561). Because of this, UI shift counts per cashier can differ from raw GET /api/reports/cash-register-closings API counts. This is pre-existing behavior, not caused by this iteration.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Playwright note: do NOT manually remove [data-testid='splash-screen'] via JS — it triggers a React NotFoundError removeChild in ErrorBoundary. Wait ~10-15s for it to auto-detach after each of (initial load, post-login, post-navigation). Removing management-alert-* via JS is safe. Reports tab click on 'إغلاق الصندوق' only works after splash detaches (not with force=True while splash is still mounted).

verification_details.expand_verified: cashier-group-0 expanded to 1 shift row with 📅 2026-07-06, 10,000 IQD, 1 طلب, +5,000 IQD, نشط badge (data-testid cashier-group-0-shift-0 present)
